sections.paragraph:
προσαχέω (Doric form for προσηχέω [Plut. et al.]; see Mlt-H. 71) resound of the surf, indicating that land is near by Ac 27:27 v.l. (resonare in mss. gig s; s. προσάγω 2a).—DELG s.v. ἠχή.

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Mlt-H. Mlt-H. = JMoulton/WHoward, A Grammar of NT Greek II: Accidence and Word-formation—List 6

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 876
